name: Rely-a-Pawn
description_short: Rely-A-Pawn is a West Memphis, AR pawn shop offering collateral-based loans and buying services for jewelry, electronics, tools, guns, and other items since 2008.
description_long:
Rely-A-Pawn opened its doors on July 7, 2008, and has operated as a traditional pawn shop in West Memphis, Arkansas for over 15 years. The business is owned by Cindy Pearcy and managed by Ashley Beecroft, with a small dedicated team. The shop is conveniently located at 3500 E Broadway (next to Pearcy Auto Sales) and maintains regular business hours Monday through Friday 9 am to 5 pm, and Saturday 9 am to 4 pm.

The company accepts a wide variety of items as collateral for pawn loans or for direct purchase, including firearms, jewelry, gold, electronics, tools, cameras, audio equipment, gaming systems, and other merchandise. As a pawn operation, they provide immediate cash in exchange for personal property, allowing customers to retrieve items within a specified redemption period or forfeit them if the loan is not repaid.

Rely-A-Pawn distinguishes itself through its local, family-owned operation and longstanding presence in the West Memphis community. The business maintains transparent contact information and accessible hours, and operates under a straightforward pawn model without the complexity of online-only or larger chain operations. Their specific focus on quality items like jewelry, gold, and electronics suggests a curated approach to inventory.

As a traditional pawn shop, Rely-A-Pawn is best suited for consumers who need immediate cash and have valuable items to pledge as collateral. The primary caveat is that pawn loans involve losing access to personal property during the loan period, and failure to repay results in permanent loss of the item. Customers should carefully consider whether they can afford to lose the pledged item and understand the loan terms before pawning.
address: 3500 E Broadway Ave # B, West Memphis, AR 72301

company_info.headquarters: 3500 E Broadway Ave # B, West Memphis, AR 72301

pros: Established, local business with 15+ years of operating history since 2008
Accepts diverse collateral including jewelry, gold, firearms, and electronics
Immediate cash availability with no credit check required
Convenient location on Broadway in West Memphis with accessible parking
Small, personalized service with identifiable owner and management
Transparent contact information and clearly posted business hours
Family-owned operation with roots in the community
cons: Limited hours (closed Sundays, closes at 5 pm weekdays and 4 pm Saturday)
Pawning items means losing access to personal property during loan period
No information provided about interest rates, loan terms, or redemption fees
Limited geographic reach—single physical location only serves West Memphis area
Failure to repay pawn loan results in permanent loss of pledged item
best_for: Consumers who need immediate cash and have valuable items as collateral
People without access to traditional credit or who prefer not to use credit
Local West Memphis residents seeking quick liquidity without bank involvement
Individuals looking to sell valuable items like jewelry, gold, or electronics
diagnosis: Rely-A-Pawn is best for West Memphis-area residents who need immediate cash and have valuable personal property to pledge as collateral. The main caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering access to items, and unpaid loans result in permanent loss of the pledged property; customers should only pawn items they can afford to lose and should understand all terms before proceeding.
services: Pawn loans on jewelry and gold items
Pawn loans on firearms and weapons
Pawn loans on electronics and audio equipment
Pawn loans on tools and equipment
Direct purchase of gold and jewelry
